title: Cryptic Registry
description: Cryptic Mushroom's registry library mod. Fully documented (soon) and comes embedded with all of our mods.
body:
# Cryptic Registry

Cryptic Registry is Cryptic Mushroom's in-house library mod focused on automated registration and data generation. It's kind of like Registrate, but with 100% more schizophrenia!

### Notes for Users

- Most hooks used by this mod are disabled in production, and are only ever enabled during data generation.
- This mod is *designed* to be embedded to a Forge mod using its Jar-in-Jar system. This Modrinth page mainly exists as a way for modpack developers to use versions of our mods that do not have any embeds (to save space and resources).

### Notes for Developers

- Documentation coming soon! It's still really early in development and only half of everything is properly documented.
- I plan on making the source code licensed under an open-source license, but I haven't decided which license yet, so I've marked this project as "ARR/No License" for now.
